tree_hash_method: SHA-256 of newline-terminated, lexicographically path-sorted lines '<file_sha256>  <relative_path>'
scope: Pinned post-arXiv-v4 release metadata and all 37 task-local input files for English Lite task 3. This is not the multi-gigabyte base workspace, a candidate output, an execution trace, a judge result, or manuscript-time evidence. Individual file hashes are reproducible locally; most task-local filenames begin with the first 16 hexadecimal characters of their content SHA-256.
